channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Systemic Healthcare Challenges Highlighted After 13-Hour Wait for First Nations Chief at Winnipeg Hospital
item.description: First Nations leaders in Manitoba are raising urgent concerns about the systemic barriers and discrimination faced by Indigenous patients in the province's healthcare system. The crisis was brought to...

item.title: ANC's Use of Social Development Portfolio as Political Reward Raises Concerns
item.description: The article criticizes the African National Congress (ANC) for transforming the social development portfolio into a tool for political patronage rather than a governance responsibility. It highlights ...

item.title: Argentina vs Spain in FIFA World Cup 2026 final: A clash of titans
item.description: Argentina and Spain will face off in the FIFA World Cup 2026 final, marking a historic showdown between the reigning champions and the team seeking their first title since 2010. Argentina, aiming for ...

item.title: ANU's FOI delays and political fallout: Implications for Andrew Wilkie and high-profile figures' trip to Italy
item.description: The article discusses the Australian National University's (ANU) prolonged delay in processing a freedom of information (FOI) request, which has raised concerns about transparency and accountability. ...

item.title: Junior Boks prepare for World Cup final showdown against France
item.description: The South African Junior Boks are on the brink of securing their second consecutive World Cup title after a dominant semifinal victory over England. The team, led by coach Kevin Foote and assistant Me...

item.title: EO-Executive Optical marks 58th anniversary with special promotions
item.description: EO-Executive Optical, a leading eyewear brand in the Philippines, is commemorating its 58th anniversary with a special anniversary sale. The event, which began on July 16, 2026, offers customers exclu...

item.title: Gladys Wanga Accuses Leaders of Orchestrating Kisumu Violence to Gain Sympathy

item.title: Trump's Bizarre Magnet Rant Confuses Defense Contractors
item.description: President Donald Trump, 80, reportedly urged attendees at the Pennsylvania Defense & Innovation Summit to 'do magnets' during a rambling speech that left defense contractors puzzled. The Daily Beast r...

item.description: The article discusses the reaction of England football supporters based in New York City following their 2-1 defeat to Argentina in a crucial match. The loss has sent Argentina to the final against Sp...

item.title: Sanjay Raut demands probe into Ram Mandir treasurer over alleged financial irregularities
item.description: Shiv Sena (UBT) MP Sanjay Raut has called for an investigation into Ram Mandir Trust Treasurer Govind Giri, alleging that the alleged theft from the temple's treasury occurred during his tenure. Raut ...

item.title: Transgender Inmate with Sexual Offense History Loses Transfer Bid to Women's Prison
item.description: Amanda Joy Cooper, a 59-year-old transgender inmate with a history of sexual offenses, has failed in her legal attempt to transfer to a women's prison. The Federal Court of Canada ruled that the Corre...

item.description: A growing Cyclospora outbreak has infected over 400 individuals across four Midwestern states, prompting the CDC to collaborate with federal and state health agencies to identify the contaminated food...

item.title: South Africa rejects claims of isolation over immigration policies, accuses Ghana of misinformation
item.description: The South African government has accused Ghana of spearheading a coordinated campaign to isolate the country from the African continent, citing tensions over its strict immigration policies. Presidenc...

item.title: Billy Joel's 'Just the Way You Are' Nearly Excluded from Album Thanks to Linda Ronstadt's Influence
item.description: Billy Joel has revealed that his iconic song 'Just the Way You Are' almost did not make it onto his 1977 album The Stranger. Initially, the artist doubted its potential, dismissing it as 'too soft' an...

item.title: New Exhibit Honors Racing Legend Gilles Villeneuve

item.title: Senator urges transparency in Ol Kalou by-election security
item.description: Senator John Methu has called on security agencies to ensure identifiable police officers are deployed at polling stations during the Ol Kalou by-election, warning against the use of hooded officers. ...

item.title: Three suspects face bail hearing in R15m gemstone theft case
